narrative:
Brookville-A (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,210 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.2 percentage points.
